test.name: 测试GET请求 - 获取用户信息

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=my_session, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 path_url=/users/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

C:\Python\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: To Json
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ 测试通过！接口返回的用户名是：Bret
kw.arg: ✅ 测试通过！接口返回的用户名是：${json['username']}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

errors.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.To Json' is deprecated. Please use ${resp.json()} instead. Have a look at the improved HTML output as pretty printing replacement.
